capture_ref_boundary: Existing profile-level VisualIntent preview captures are recorded; this turn does not fabricate per-candidate captures.
claim_boundary: VisualIntent proof evidence is preview/instrument evidence only; not artistic acceptance, not compatibility certification, and not stable promotion.
generated_output_policy: Candidate compile artifacts are generated under out/ by check_visual_intent_resolver.py and are not committed.
limitation: Every generated candidate is reduced to a Plasma v2 spec and packc-compiled during validation; current committed capture evidence is profile-level, not one capture bundle per candidate.
